title: wendlandia psychotrioides
intro: Wendlandia psychotrioides, also known as the Bokain, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Wendlandia psychotrioides include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Wendlandia psychotrioides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other remedies for various health conditions.
